summary: G2 migration v3_007_document_knowledge.sql: staging + live tables with works-layer deltas
description: Design §1 SQL with §6.1 deltas: staged_dossier_fields (work_id, partial-unique pending index), staged_summaries (+work_id, text_id nullable for multi-member L2), work_dossiers (work_id PK), summary_nodes (+work_id, children_hash), summary_embeddings.
